note: AI Engine page synced to v0.25.0. Adds M25 (Human Command Center + Approval Ritual): approval request schema, operator inbox, daily brief, operator feedback loop, executive summary, four CLI scripts and three new dashboard endpoints. Golden rule: the AI may ask for permission, the AI cannot grant permission to itself. 1,402 / 1,402 tests green. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
